message:
Running command: 
# The step 72 log is larger than the pipe_manager log - LibreLane is writing to the step log
# directly while the pipe_manager reads the SAME pipe. They're competing!
# 
# The step 72 log shows DRT-0120 warnings still being written.
# Let me check the step 72 log fully

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
wc -l "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null
wc -c "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null
stat "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" | grep Modify
echo "--- Last 10 meaningful lines ---"
grep -v "^$" "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null | tail -10
